ItacPersonItem.Notes: In a letter, Belisario Bulgarini informed his friend Flavio Figliucci that Squarci had delivered a Latin oration in the Accesi academy in Siena, and that the oration was `arricchita da un`invenzione`. See Ricco` 1989.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
